rosterSource: kalshi KXUFCFIGHT (independent of the price source)

26JUL25.tierMeaning: BFO opening consensus line, both sides, de-vigged; cross-book dispersion from the closing range

priceTimestamps.note: BFO does not publish when the line opened; this price is the market's FIRST price and is used as a logical 'as of market open' prior, not as a wall-clock observation

26JUL25.deVigMethod: proportional normalisation: pA/(pA+pB), both sides' vig-included implied probabilities
26JUL25.dispersionBasis: width of the closing cross-book range (a width, not a level — carries no directional information)
missingSourceReasons: A: no live multi-book snapshot supplied

provenance.deVig: proportional normalisation: pA/(pA+pB), both sides' vig-included implied probabilities
